article.title: Sneak Peak: Proof-of-Concept of Customisable Footer for a LocalGov Drupal Microsite

body.value: Note: this is VERY MUCH a proof-of-concept. What you see here may or may not end up in the final product.
body.processed: Note: this is VERY MUCH a proof-of-concept. What you see here may or may not end up in the final product.

field_intro.value: Here's a short video giving a proof-of-concept for how to create a customisable footer for a microsite based on LocalGov Drupal and Group Module.

field_m_image_image.alt: LocalGov Drupal Customisable Microsite Footer, with colour scheme based on Essex County Council colours
